description: Omission / Negative Automaintenance (Williams & Williams, 1969): CS-US pairing is the baseline arrangement, and a key-peck during CS cancels the US for that trial. The @omission annotation on the pair expression records the cancellation rule (response→US cancellation), making the response-contingent execution semantics explicit on the AST.
_note: The @omission annotation is the declarative form of the response-contingent US cancellation rule. An analyzer/executor pass interprets it: when a `response` occurs `during` the CS presentation, the scheduled US is cancelled for that trial. Fully expresses Williams & Williams (1969) negative automaintenance.
